PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/test/tipo-album-id" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "$\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content\)" } else { "Request failed" }; $body = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\(\(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@t.com","senha":"X"}' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Content\); $body)

PowerShell($timestamp = [DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow.ToUnixTimeMilliseconds\(\); $email = "explore_$timestamp@test.com"; $body = @{ name = "Explorador Teste"; email = $email; password = "Explore@1234!"; declaracaoMaioridade = $true } | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "BODY: $\($r.Content\)"; Write-Output "EMAIL: $email")

PowerShell($email = "explore_1780527207714@test.com"; $token = mongosh "mongodb://localhost:27017/ndab-meualbum" --quiet --eval "const u = db.users.findOne\({email: '$email'}\); const t = db.tokenconfirmacaocadastros.findOne\({usuarioId: u._id, usadoEm: null}\); print\(t.token\);" 2>&1; Write-Output "TOKEN: $token")
